# Claude Skill Authoring: Source Index

This index maps the authoritative and reference sources used to build the Snowiki Claude skill authoring guide.
It is the durable provenance layer for this research lane: each entry records source type, canonical URL, local capture or durable note location, an accessed-on marker, and why the source matters.

Official guidance is normative for skill behavior. External pattern references are non-normative and are used only to inform packaging and workflow patterns.

## 1. Authoritative Sources (Official)

| Source Name | Type | Canonical URL | Local Capture | Durable Notes | Accessed | Why It Matters |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Claude Code Skills Docs | Documentation | [code.claude.com/docs/en/skills](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills) | `.cache/research/claude-skills/code-claude-skills.md` | `docs/roadmap/external/claude-skills/official-guidance-notes.md` | 2026-04-18 | Primary Claude Code reference for discovery, loading, front matter, supporting files, bundled skills, and invocation behavior. |
| Agent Skills Overview | Documentation | [platform.claude.com/docs/en/agents-and-tools/agent-skills/overview](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/agents-and-tools/agent-skills/overview) | `.cache/research/claude-skills/platform-claude-agent-skills-overview.md` | `docs/roadmap/external/claude-skills/official-guidance-notes.md` | 2026-04-18 | Defines the Agent Skills model, progressive disclosure architecture, and skill package layers. |

| agentskills.io | Specification | [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io) | `.cache/research/claude-skills/agentskills-io.md` | `docs/roadmap/external/claude-skills/official-guidance-notes.md` | 2026-04-18 | Specification home for the Agent Skills standard that Claude Code extends. |
